name: Batter for Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup of ice water, 1/2 teaspoon of yellow food coloring (optional), 2 tablespoons of corn oil, and 1 teaspoon of salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Gradually add 1 cup of flour to the mixture while stirring rapidly with a whisk.
3. Just before using, stir in 1 teaspoon of baking powder.
4. Dip fish fillets into the batter and deep fry. This recipe produces a very thick, crispy batter that also gives the coating a golden color if food coloring is used.
